# AGENTIX AI

> AI web studio building websites that work for both human visitors and AI agents.

## About

AGENTIX AI is an AI web studio based in Bratislava, Slovakia, serving clients globally. We build three-layer websites that are fast, AI-powered, and visible to AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude.

Founded by a former security consultant (Deloitte, IBM, Takeda) with deep AI development knowledge and design expertise.

## What We Build

### Layer 01 — AI-Built Websites
Fast, beautiful, custom websites built with AI tools. Delivered in 5–7 days. Starting from €1,200. Includes full SEO setup, GDPR compliance, Vercel deployment, and Layer 03 basics as standard.

### Layer 02 — AI-Powered Websites
Websites with embedded AI agents that qualify leads, answer questions, book meetings, and handle support 24/7 without a human in the loop. Add-on from €1,500 setup.

### Layer 03 — Agent-Friendly Websites
Websites structured so AI agents can read, cite, navigate, and transact with them:
- llms.txt implementation
- Schema.org JSON-LD structured data
- AI crawler permissions (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Googlebot)
- AEO/GEO content optimization
- MCP server integration (premium tier)

## Pricing

| Tier | Price | Includes |
|------|-------|----------|
| Starter | €1,200–€1,500 | AI-built site + Layer 03 basics |
| Studio | €2,500–€3,500 | Starter + AEO/GEO + strategy session |
| Premium | €4,000–€6,000 | Studio + custom design + 1 month free maintenance |
| AI Agent Add-on | +€1,500–€2,500 | Embedded lead qualification agent |
| MCP Integration | +€2,000–€3,500 | Full MCP server, agent-callable tools |
| Maintenance | €150–€300/month | Security, updates, AI visibility monitoring |

## Who We Work With

- Marketing agencies and freelancers who need a white-label AI web partner
- Tech companies and cybersecurity startups with outdated or AI-invisible websites
- SaaS companies (€500K–€5M ARR) who need websites visible to AI search

## Why This Matters Now

- 60.3% of US Google queries now show an AI Overview — the answer never leaves Google
- 59% of retail site traffic is already bots and agents, not humans
- AI search traffic converts at 2× the rate of traditional organic
- 18% of all organic referral traffic now comes from AI search engines
